doc: Pure-TS port of GMP mpn_add_1: add a single-limb scalar x to the n-limb non-negative integer stored in s (little-endian), returning the n-limb sum and the carry-out limb (0 or 1). Substrate-class -- operates on raw bigint arrays, not src/core.ts MPFR values; runner sets requireCoreImport=false for substrate. The carry chain propagates from limb 0 upward; net cost is O(1) expected (carry stops at the first non-ripple limb) and O(n) worst case (when s is all-ones).
c_signature: mp_limb_t mpn_add_1(mp_limb_t *rp, const mp_limb_t *sp, mp_size_t n, mp_limb_t x)
refs: GMP manual §8.3 (Low-level Functions): single-limb add with carry-out.
mpfr/src/add1.c, mpfr/src/add1sp.c -- canonical MPFR callers (significand += 1 ulp).
mpfr/src/div.c, mpfr/src/div_ui.c -- callers in the division path.
